findings.title: Validator brace balance unverified from diff
findings.disposition: The concern was checked with node -c scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs and npm run rp00:control-plane:validate. The validator parsed and executed; before evidence materialization it failed only for the expected missing S03 evidence files, and after evidence it passes.

findings.title: Mixed tab/space indentation in model test import block
findings.disposition: Tabs in packages/control-plane/test/model.test.js were normalized to spaces. Focused model tests and git diff --check were rerun after the fix.

findings.title: Contract completion gate indentation churn
findings.disposition: The inconsistent closeout_requirements indentation was normalized before production_ready promotion.

findings.title: S03 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S03 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S03 tenant-scope slice as scope-compliant with correct fail-closed tenant behavior, no states.js or entity registry mutation, no real data, no product-state writes, M08 domain-model completion, and handoff to RP00.P01.M09.S01. The P1 brace-balance concern was resolved by validator syntax/execution checks; P2/P3 whitespace findings were fixed; closeout blockers are closed by evidence.
